name: nook
description: Build and edit your personal local Nook apps directly from Claude.
long_description: Nook is a personal, local-first app builder. This extension lets Claude create apps (fields + views), add fields, and read/write records in your Nook workspace. It talks to the Nook desktop app's localhost API — the app owns your data, which never leaves your machine. The Nook desktop app must be running.

api_url.title: Nook local API URL
api_url.description: The Nook desktop app's local API. Change only if you customized the port.

tools.name: add_field
tools.description: Add a field to an app
